ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the measure was implemented */,
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income level of the country */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the authority that implemented the measure */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the measure was announced or implemented */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the measure becomes effective */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the measure (e.g., Active, Terminated, Modified) */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the measure's impact on the financial market */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "measure_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of measure */,
  "level_1_policy" TEXT /* General area of the policy measure (e.g., Banking sector, Liquidity/funding) */,
  "level_2_policy" TEXT /* Specific policy measure at level 2 (e.g., Operational continuity, Liquidity (incl FX)/ELA) */,
  "level_3_policy" TEXT /* Specific policy measure at level 3 (e.g., Blank, Other integrity) */,
  "measure_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the measure */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the official document or source */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the measure will terminate or has terminated */,
  "modification_of_parent_measure" TEXT /* Indicates if the measure is a modification of a parent measure */,
  "parent_measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent measure, if applicable */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the measure entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the measure entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measure entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measure entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_income_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_level_id") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("authority_id") REFERENCES authorities ("authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_measure_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_type_id") REFERENCES measure_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_parent_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso3_code" TEXT /* ISO3 code of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level (e.g., High income, Upper middle income) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the authority (e.g., SUP, CB) */,
  "authority_type" TEXT /* Type of authority (e.g., Central Bank, Regulatory Body) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measure_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure type (e.g., Level 1 policy, Level 2 policy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the measure type (e.g., Monetary, Fiscal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Asia, Europe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Analyst, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
